struct disjoint_set_union {
private:
    std::vector<int> f, g;
public:
    disjoint_set_union(int n)
    : f(n + 1), g(n + 1) {
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) f[i] = i, g[i] = 1;
    }
    auto find(int x) -> int {
        return x == f[x] ? x : f[x] = find(f[x]);
    }
    auto check(int x, int y) -> bool {
        return find(x) == find(y);
    }
    auto merge(int x, int y) -> void {
        if ((x = find(x)) == (y = find(y)))
            return;
        if (g[x] > g[y])
            g[x] += g[y], f[y] = x;
        else    
            g[y] += g[x], f[x] = y;
    }
};

template <typename T> struct fenwick_tree {
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<T> f;
public:
    #define lowbit(x) (x & -x)
    fenwick_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(_n + 1) {}
    fenwick_tree(std::vector<T> info)
    : fenwick_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
            f[i] += info[i];
            if (i + lowbit(i) <= n) {
                f[i + lowbit(i)] += f[i];
            }
        }
    }
    auto update(int u, T x) -> void {
        for (; 1 <= u && u <= n; f[u] += x, u += lowbit(u));
    }
    auto query(int u, T x = T()) -> T {
        for (; u; x += f[u], u -= lowbit(u)); return x;
    }
    auto find_first(T x) -> int {
        int res = 0;
        for (int i = 1 << std::__lg(n); i; i >>= 1) {
            if ((res | i) <= n && f[res | i] < x)
                x -= f[res | i];
        }
        return res + 1;
    }
    #undef lowbit
};

template <typename Info> struct segment_tree {
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int u, Info x) -> void {
        if (u < l || r < u) return;
        if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = x);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, u, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, u, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
};

template <typename Info, typename Lazy> struct segment_tree {
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
    std::vector<Lazy> g;
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)), g(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto push_down(int p) -> void {
        f[lson] += g[p], g[lson] += g[p];
        f[rson] += g[p], g[rson] += g[p];
        g[p] = Lazy();
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, Lazy x) -> void {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return;
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return (void)(f[p] += x, g[p] += x);
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, L, R, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        push_down(p);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
};

docs.text:
std::vector<int> all = {-1};

struct info {
    int len, tag;
    info()
    : len(0), tag(0) {}
    info(int _len, int _tag)
    : len(_len), tag(_tag) {}
}

template <typename Info> struct segment_tree {
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    auto push_up(int p, int l, int r) -> void {
        if (f[p].tag)
            f[p].len = all[r + 1] - all[l];
        else if (l != r)
            f[p].len = f[lson].len + f[rson].len;
        else
            f[p].len = 0;
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, int x) -> void {
        if (R <= all[l] || all[r + 1] <= L) return;
        if (L <= all[l] && all[r + 1] <= R) return (void)(f[p].tag += x, push_up(p, l, r));
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, L, R, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, x);
        push_up(p, l, r);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> int {
        if (R <= all[l] || all[r + 1] <= L) return 0;
        if (L <= all[l] && all[r + 1] <= R) return f[p].len;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
};

template <typename T> struct sparse_table {
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<std::vector<T>> f;
public:
    sparse_table(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(std::__lg(n) + 1, std::vector<T>(_n + 1)) {}
    sparse_table(std::vector<T> info, auto &check)
    : sparse_table(info.size() - 1) {
        f[0] = info;
        for (int k = 1; k <= std::__lg(n); ++k)
            for (int i = 1; i + (1 << k) - 1 <= n; ++i)
                f[k][i] = check(f[k - 1][i], f[k - 1][i + (1 << k - 1)]);
    }
    auto query(int l, int r, auto &check) -> T {
        int k = std::__lg(r - l + 1);
        return check(f[k][l], f[k][r - (1 << k) + 1]);
    }
};

template <typename Edge> struct lowest_common_ancestor {
private:
    std::vector<int> dfn;
    std::vector<std::vector<int>> f;
public:
    lowest_common_ancestor(int n, int root, std::vector<std::vector<Edge>> &G)
    : dfn(n + 1), f(std::__lg(n) + 1, std::vector<int>(n + 1)) {
        int timer = 0;
        auto dfs = [&](auto &&self, int u, int p) -> void {
            dfn[u] = ++timer;
            f[0][timer] = p;

            for (auto &[v] : G[u]) {
                if (v == p) continue;
                self(self, v, u);
            }
        };
        dfs(dfs, root, 0);

        for (int k = 1; k <= std::__lg(n); ++k) {
            for (int i = 1; i + (1 << k) - 1 <= n; ++i) {
                f[k][i] = check(f[k - 1][i], f[k - 1][i + (1 << k - 1)]);
            }
        }
    }
    auto check(const int x, const int y) -> int {
        return dfn[x] < dfn[y] ? x : y;
    }
    auto query(int x, int y) -> int {
        if (x == y)
            return x;
        if (dfn[x] > dfn[y])
            std::swap(x, y);
        int k = std::__lg(y - x);
        return check(f[k][x + 1], f[k][y - (1 << k) + 1]);
    }
};

docs.title: 重链剖分
docs.text:
template <typename Edge> struct lowest_common_ancestor {
private:
    std::vector<int> siz, dep, son, ant, top;
public:
    lowest_common_ancestor(int n, int root, std::vector<std::vector<Edge>> &G)
    : siz(n + 1, 1), dep(n + 1), son(n + 1), ant(n + 1), top(n + 1) {
        auto dfs1 = [&](auto &&self, int u) -> void {
            dep[u] = dep[ant[u]] + 1;
            for (auto &[v] : G[u]) {
                if (v == ant[u]) continue;
                ant[v] = u;
                self(self, v);
                siz[u] += siz[v];
                if (siz[v] > siz[son[u]]) {
                    son[u] = v;
                }
            }
        };
        auto dfs2 = [&](auto &&self, int u, int g) -> void {
            top[u] = g;
            if (son[u])
                self(self, son[u], g);
            for (auto &[v] : G[u]) {
                if (v == ant[u] || v == son[u]) continue;
                self(self, v, v);
            }
        };
        dfs1(dfs1, root);
        dfs2(dfs2, root, root);
    }
    auto query(int x, int y) -> int {
        while (top[x] != top[y]) {
            if (dep[top[x]] > dep[top[y]])
                x = ant[top[x]];
            else
                y = ant[top[y]];
        }
        return dep[x] < dep[y] ? x : y;
    }
};

struct edge {
    int v, id;
    edge() : v(0), id(0) {}
    edge(int _v, int _id) : v(_v), id(_id) {}
};

auto tarjan_cut_edge(int n, int m, std::vector<std::vector<edge>> &G) -> std::vector<int> {
    static std::vector<int> dfn, low, cut;
    dfn.assign(n + 1, 0);
    low.assign(n + 1, 0);
    cut.assign(m * 2 + 2, 0);

    int timer = 0;
    auto tarjan = [&](auto &&self, int u, int pre_id) -> void {
        dfn[u] = low[u] = ++timer;

        for (auto &[v, id] : G[u]) {
            if (id == (pre_id ^ 1))
                continue;
            if (!dfn[v]) {
                self(self, v, id);
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);
                if (low[v] > dfn[u])
                    cut[id] = cut[id ^ 1] = 1;
            } else {
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);
            }
        }
    };

    for (int u = 1; u <= n; ++u) if (!dfn[u]) tarjan(tarjan, u, 0);

    return cut;
}

struct edge {
    int v;
    edge() : v(0) {}
    edge(int _v) : v(_v) {}
};

auto tarjan_cut_node(int n, std::vector<std::vector<edge>> &G) -> std::vector<int> {
    static std::vector<int> dfn, low, cut;
    dfn.assign(n + 1, 0);
    low.assign(n + 1, 0);
    cut.assign(n + 1, 0);

    int timer = 0, root;
    auto tarjan = [&](auto &&self, int u) -> void {
        dfn[u] = low[u] = ++timer;

        int cnt = 0;
        for (auto &[v] : G[u]) {
            if (!dfn[v]) {
                ++cnt;
                self(self, v);
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);
                if (low[v] >= dfn[u] && u != root)
                    cut[u] = 1;
            } else {
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);
            }
        }

        if (cnt >= 2 && u == root) cut[u] = 1;
    };

    for (int u = 1; u <= n; ++u)
        if (!dfn[u]) tarjan(tarjan, root = u);

    return cut;
}

struct edge {
    int v, id;
    edge() : v(0), id(0) {}
    edge(int _v, int _id) : v(_v), id(_id) {}
};

auto tarjan_ebcc(int n, std::vector<std::vector<edge>> &G) -> std::tuple<int, std::vector<int>, std::vector<std::vector<edge>>> {
    static std::vector<int> dfn, low, bcc;
    dfn.assign(n + 1, 0);
    low.assign(n + 1, 0);
    bcc.assign(n + 1, 0);

    int timer = 0, bcc_n = 0;
    auto tarjan = [&](auto &&self, int u, int pre_id) -> void {
        dfn[u] = low[u] = ++timer;

        static std::vector<int> stack;
        stack.push_back(u);

        for (auto &[v, id] : G[u]) {
            if (id == (pre_id ^ 1))
                continue;
            if (!dfn[v]) {
                self(self, v, id);
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);
            } else if (!bcc[v]) {
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);
            }
        }

        if (dfn[u] == low[u] && ++bcc_n) {
            while (!stack.empty()) {
                auto v = stack.back(); stack.pop_back();
                bcc[v] = bcc_n;
                if (v == u) break;
            }
        }
    };

    for (int u = 1; u <= n; ++u) if (!dfn[u]) tarjan(tarjan, u, 0);

    std::vector<std::vector<edge>> bcc_G(bcc_n + 1);
    for (int u = 1; u <= n; ++u) {
        for (auto &[v, id] : G[u]) {
            if (bcc[u] == bcc[v]) continue;
            bcc_G[bcc[u]].emplace_back(bcc[v], 0);
        }
    }

    return {bcc_n, bcc, bcc_G};
}

struct edge {
    int v;
    edge() : v(0) {}
    edge(int _v) : v(_v) {}
};

auto tarjan_vbcc(int n, std::vector<std::vector<edge>> &G) -> std::tuple<int, std::vector<std::vector<int>>> {
    static std::vector<int> dfn, low;
    static std::vector<std::vector<int>> bcc;
    dfn.assign(n + 1, 0);
    low.assign(n + 1, 0);

    int timer = 0, bcc_n = 0;
    auto tarjan = [&](auto &&self, int u) -> void {
        dfn[u] = low[u] = ++timer;

        static std::vector<int> stack;
        if (G[u].empty() && ++bcc_n)
            return (void)(bcc.push_back(std::vector<int>(1, u)));
        else
            stack.push_back(u);

        for (auto &[v] : G[u]) {
            if (!dfn[v]) {
                self(self, v);
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], low[v]);
                if (low[v] >= dfn[u] && ++bcc_n) {
                    bcc.push_back(std::vector<int>());
                    while (!stack.empty()) {
                        auto p = stack.back(); stack.pop_back();
                        bcc[bcc_n - 1].push_back(p);
                        if (p == v) break;
                    }
                    bcc[bcc_n - 1].push_back(u);
                }
            } else {
                low[u] = std::min(low[u], dfn[v]);
            }
        }
    };

    for (int u = 1; u <= n; ++u)
        if (!dfn[u]) tarjan(tarjan, u);

    return {bcc_n, bcc};
}

auto binary_sqrt(uInt n) -> uInt {
    uInt x = 0, y;
    for (int i = 31; i >= 0; --i) {
        y = x | 1LL << i;
        if (y * y == n)
            return y;
        if (y * y <= n)
            x = y;
    }
    return x;
}

template <typename T>
constexpr auto quick_power(T a, uInt b, T res = T(1)) -> T {
    for (; b; a *= a, b >>= 1) if (b & 1) res *= a; return res;
}

template <Int P> struct mod_int {
private:
    Int x;
public:
    static Int M;
    constexpr static Int get_mod() {
        return P ? P : M;
    }
    constexpr mod_int(Int _x = 0)
    : x(check(_x % get_mod())) {}
    constexpr Int check(Int val) const {
        if (val < 0)
            val += get_mod();
        if (val >= get_mod())
            val -= get_mod();
        return val;
    }
    constexpr mod_int inv() const {
        return quick_power(*this, get_mod() - 2);
    }
    constexpr mod_int operator - () const {
        return mod_int(check(get_mod() - *this));
    }
    constexpr mod_int &operator += (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x + other.x); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator -= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x - other.x); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator *= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x * other.x % get_mod()); return *this; }
    constexpr mod_int &operator /= (mod_int other) & { this->x = check(this->x * other.inv() % get_mod()); return *this; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator + (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l += r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator - (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l -= r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator * (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l *= r; }
    friend constexpr mod_int operator / (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l /= r; }
    friend constexpr bool operator == (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l.x == r.x; }
    friend constexpr bool operator != (mod_int l, mod_int r) { return l.x != r.x; }
    friend constexpr std::istream &operator >> (std::istream &is, mod_int &val) {
        return is >> val.x, val = mod_int(val.x), is;
    }
    friend constexpr std::ostream &operator << (std::ostream &os, const mod_int &val) {
        return os << val.x;
    }
};

namespace Gcd {
    constexpr auto gcd_impl(std::unsigned_integral auto x, std::unsigned_integral auto y) -> decltype(auto) {
        if (x == y)
            return x;
        const auto a = y - x;
        const auto b = x - y;
        const auto s = x < y ? a : b;
        const auto t = x < y ? x : y;
        const uint32_t n = std::countr_zero(b);
        return gcd_impl(s >> n, t);
    }
    constexpr auto gcd(std::unsigned_integral auto x, std::unsigned_integral auto y) -> decltype(auto) {
        if (x == 0 || y == 0)
            return x | y;
        const uint32_t n = std::countr_zero(x);
        const uint32_t m = std::countr_zero(y);
        return gcd_impl(x >> n, y >> m) << (n < m ? n : m);
    }
}

namespace Prime {
    static constexpr uInt C1 = 1;
    static constexpr uInt C2 = 2;
    static constexpr uInt M  = 512;

    template <std::unsigned_integral T>
    constexpr auto is_prime(T n) -> bool {
        if (n < 64)
            return 0x28208a20a08a28ac >> n & 1;
        if (n % 2  == 0 || n % 3  == 0 || n % 5  == 0 || n % 7  == 0 ||
            n % 11 == 0 || n % 13 == 0 || n % 17 == 0 || n % 19 == 0)
            return false;

        constexpr auto dig = std::numeric_limits<T>::digits;
        using size = std::conditional_t<(dig < 63), uInt, __uint128_t>;
        const uInt cnt = std::countr_zero(n - 1);
        const T    tmp = (n - 1) >> cnt;

        T inv = T(2) - n;
        for (uint32_t i = dig < 63; i < 5; ++i)
            inv *= T(2) - n * inv;

        const auto mult = [&n, &inv](T x, T y) -> T {
            const auto res = size(x) * y;
            return n + T(res >> dig) - T(((size)(T(res) * inv) * n) >> dig);
        };

        const T inv_n = -size(n) % n;
        const T neg_n = -n % n;
        const T rdu_n = n - neg_n;

        const auto test = [&](const std::initializer_list<T> &L) -> bool {
            return std::all_of(L.begin(), L.end(),
                [&](auto B) -> bool {
                    if (B >= n) return true;

                    T res = neg_n;
                    B = mult(B, inv_n);
                    for (T i = tmp; i != 0; i >>= 1) {
                        if (i & 1) res = mult(res, B);
                        B = mult(B, B);
                    }
                    res = std::min(res, res - n);

                    if (res == neg_n || res == rdu_n)
                        return true;

                    for (uint32_t i = 0; i + 1 < cnt; ++i) {
                        res = mult(res, res);
                        const auto check = std::min(res, res - n);
                        if (check == neg_n)
                            return false;
                        if (check == rdu_n)
                            return true;
                    }

                    return false;
                }
            );
        };

        if (n < 4759123141)
            return test({2, 7, 61});
        else if (n < 75792980677)
            return test({2, 379215, 457083754});
        else if (n < 21652684502221)
            return test({2, 1215, 34862, 574237825});
        else
            return test({2, 325, 9375, 28178, 450775, 9780504, 1795265022});
    }

    template <std::unsigned_integral T>
    constexpr auto max_prime(T n) -> T {
        if (~n & 1)
            return 2;

        constexpr auto dig = std::numeric_limits<T>::digits;
        using size = std::conditional_t<(dig < 63), uInt, __uint128_t>;

        T inv = T(2) - n;
        for (uint32_t i = dig < 63; i < 5; ++i)
            inv *= T(2) - n * inv;

        const auto mult = [&n, &inv](T x, T y) -> T {
            const auto res = size(x) * y;
            return n + T(res >> dig) - T(((size)(T(res) * inv) * n) >> dig);
        };

        T Z1 = 1, Z2 = 2, res = 0;
        const auto get = [&]() -> void {
            T z1 = Z1, z2 = Z2;
            for (uInt i = M; ; i *= 2) {
                T x1 = z1 + n, x2 = z2 + n;
                for (uInt j = 0; j < i; j += M) {
                    T y1 = z1, y2 = z2, q1 = 1, q2 = 2;
                    z1 = mult(z1, z1) + C1;
                    z2 = mult(z2, z2) + C2;
                    for (uInt k = 0; k < M; ++k) {
                        T t1 = x1 - z1, t2 = x2 - z2;
                        q1 = mult(q1, t1);
                        q2 = mult(q2, t2);
                        z1 = mult(z1, z1) + C1;
                        z2 = mult(z2, z2) + C2;
                    }
                    q1 = mult(q1, x1 - z1);
                    q2 = mult(q2, x2 - z2);
                    const T q3 = mult(q1, q2);
                    const T p3 = Gcd::gcd(n, q3);
                    if (p3 == 1)
                        continue;
                    if (p3 != n)
                        return (void)(res = p3);
                    const T p1 = Gcd::gcd(n, q1);
                    const T p2 = Gcd::gcd(n, q2);
                    const T C  = p1 != 1 ? C1 : C2;
                    const T x  = p1 != 1 ? x1 : x2;
                    T y = p1 != 1 ? y1 : y2;
                    T p = p1 != 1 ? p1 : p2;
                    if (p == n) {
                        do {
                            y = mult(y, y) + C;
                            p = Gcd::gcd(n, x - y);
                        } while (p == 1);
                    }
                    if (p != n)
                        return (void)(res = p);
                    Z1 += 2;
                    Z2 += 2;
                    return;
                }
            }
        };

        while (res == 0)
            get();
        return res;
    }

    template <std::unsigned_integral T, typename OptFunc>
    constexpr auto enumerate(const T &n, OptFunc &&func) -> void {
        if (is_prime(n)) {
            return (void)(func(n));
        }
        const auto f{max_prime(n)};
        enumerate(f, func);
        enumerate(n / f, func);
    }

    template <std::unsigned_integral T>
    constexpr auto prime_factors(T n) -> std::vector<std::array<T, 2>> {
        std::vector<std::array<T, 2>> res;

        if (~n & 1) {
            const uint32_t zero = std::countr_zero(n);
            res.emplace_back(2, zero);
            n >>= zero;
        }

        if (n > 1) {
            enumerate(n,
                [&](const auto &x) -> void {
                    res.push_back({x, 1});
                }
            );
        }

        uint32_t m = 0;
        std::sort(res.begin(), res.end());
        for (uint32_t i = 1; i < res.size(); ++i) {
            if (res[m][0] == res[i][0])
                res[m][1] += res[i][1];
            else
                res[++m] = res[i];
        }
        res.resize(m + 1);

        return res;
    }
}

template <int N>
auto prime_sieve() -> std::vector<int> {
    std::vector<int> prime;
    std::bitset<N + 1> is_prime;
    for (int i = 2; i <= N; i++) {
        if (!is_prime[i])
            prime.push_back(i);
        for (auto &p : prime) {
            if (i * p > N) break;
            is_prime[i * p] = 1;
            if (i % p == 0) break;
        }
    }
    return prime;
}

auto kmp(const std::string &main_string, const std::string &pattern_string) -> std::vector<int> {
    static std::string s;
    static std::vector<int> p;
    s = pattern_string + "#" + main_string;
    p.assign(s.size(), 0);
    for (int i = 1, j; i < s.size(); ++i) {
        j = p[i - 1];
        while (j && s[i] != s[j])
            j = p[j - 1];
        p[i] = j + (s[i] == s[j]);
    }
    return p;
}

template <uInt B, uInt P> struct string_hash_mInt {
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<uInt> hash, base;
public:
    string_hash_mInt(const std::string &s, const char offset = 'a')
    : n(s.size()), hash(s.size() + 1), base(s.size() + 1, 1) {
        for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
            base[i + 1] = base[i] * B % P;
            hash[i + 1] = (hash[i] + (s[i] - offset) * base[i] % P) % P;
        }
    }
    auto query(int l, int r) -> uInt {
        return (hash[r] - hash[l - 1] + P) % P * base[n - l + 1] % P; 
    }
};

template <uInt B> struct string_hash {
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<uInt> hash, base;
public:
    string_hash(const std::string &s = "", const char offset = 'a')
    : n(s.size()), hash(s.size() + 1, 1), base(s.size() + 1) {
        for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
            base[i + 1] = base[i] * B;
            hash[i + 1] = hash[i] + (s[i] - offset) * base[i];
        }
    }
    auto query(int l, int r) -> uInt {
        return (hash[r] - hash[l - 1]) * base[n - l + 1];
    }
};

思路
docs.text: 考虑这种明显和状态相关的最值相关问题，直接考虑记忆化搜索，每次只需要考虑搜索不选，A选/B选，三种即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    int n, k;
    std::cin >> n >> k;

    std::vector<Int> a(n + 1), b(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        std::cin >> a[i];
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        std::cin >> b[i];
    std::sort(a.begin() + 1, a.end(), std::greater());
    std::sort(b.begin() + 1, b.end(), std::greater());

    std::vector f(k + 1, std::vector(k + 1, std::vector<Int>(2 * n + 1)));
    std::vector g(k + 1, std::vector(k + 1, std::vector<int>(2 * n + 1)));
    auto dfs = [&](auto &&self, int r, int A, int B) -> Int {
        if (r > 2 * n)
            return 0;
        if (g[A][B][r])
            return f[A][B][r];

        g[A][B][r] = 1;

        int aid = r / 2 + 1 + A - B;
        int bid = r / 2 + 1 - A + B;

        Int &val = f[A][B][r];
        val = self(self, r + 1, A, B);

        if (r & 1) {
            if (aid <= n && A < k) val = std::max(val, self(self, r + 1, A + 1, B) + a[aid]);
        } else {
            if (bid <= n && B < k) val = std::min(val, self(self, r + 1, A, B + 1) - b[bid]);
        }

        return val;
    };

    std::cout << dfs(dfs, 1, 0, 0) << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Tag: 图论，根号暴力，动态规划
思路
docs.text:
考虑动态规划，当前状态的最小值与我后继状态的最小值相关，所以对于询问，倒着 DP 即可：$f(u) = min(f(v) + w)$

但是如果特别暴力的话肯定会 $TLE$，再考虑如何优化遍历周围相关的点

对度数进行分块即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

constexpr Int mod = 998244353;
constexpr Int INF = 1e18;
constexpr Int siz = 888;

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m, q;
    std::cin >> n >> m >> q;

    std::vector<int> a(n + 1), b(q + 1), deg(n + 1);
    std::vector<Int> f(n + 1);
    std::vector<std::multiset<Int>> cnt(n + 1);
    std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<int, int>>> e(n + 1);
    std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<int, int>>> G(n + 1);

    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        std::cin >> a[i];
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        int u, v, w;
        std::cin >> u >> v >> w;
        e[u].push_back({v, w});
        e[v].push_back({u, w});
        deg[u]++;
        deg[v]++;
    }
    for (int u = 1; u <= n; u++) {
        for (auto &[v, w] : e[u]) {
            if (deg[v] >= siz) {
                G[u].push_back({v, w});
                cnt[v].emplace(w);
            }
        }
    }

    for (int i = 1; i <= q; i++)
        std::cin >> b[i];
    for (int i = q; i >= 1; i--) {
        int u = b[i];
        Int p = f[u];

        if (deg[u] < siz) {
            f[u] = INF;
            for (auto &[v, w] : e[u])
                f[u] = std::min(f[u], f[v] + w);
        } else {
            f[u] = *cnt[u].begin();
        }

        for (auto &[v, w] : G[u]) {
            cnt[v].extract(p + w);
            cnt[v].emplace(f[u] + w);
        }
    }

    Int ans = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        ans = (ans + f[i] % mod * a[i] % mod) % mod;
    }

    std::cout << ans << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    // for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
对于两人 $i, j$ 之间的关系，一定会有 $a_i < a_j$ 或 $a_i > a_j$，那么考虑现在有 $n$ 个人，每次删除人数的最小值

只有交错删的这种情况是最差的，但是也删除掉了一半的人

所以直接暴力模拟的话，至多 $log(n)$ 轮即可删到 $1$ 人

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

auto code() -> void {
    int n;
    std::cin >> n;

    std::vector<int> a(n);
    for (auto &x : a)
        std::cin >> x;

    int cnt = 0;
    while (a.size() != 1) {
        std::vector<int> b;
        for (int i = 0; i < a.size(); i++) {
            bool flag = true;
            if (a[i] != a.front() && a[i] < a[i - 1])
                flag = false;
            if (a[i] != a.back()  && a[i] < a[i + 1])
                flag = false;
            if (flag) b.push_back(a[i]);
        }
        a.swap(b);
        cnt++;
    }

    std::cout << cnt << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

        code();

    return 0;
}

        Int b = pq.top(); pq.pop();
        pq.push(a + b >> 1);

思路
docs.text: 有了 C1 的启发后，我们会发现只需要 B 去重后是 A 的前缀那么就满足条件，所以线段树暴力维护前缀长度即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

template <typename Info> struct segment_tree {
public:
    #define lson (p << 1)
    #define rson (p << 1 | 1)
    segment_tree(int _n)
    : n(_n), f(4 << std::__lg(_n)) {}
    segment_tree(std::vector<Info> info)
    : segment_tree(info.size() - 1) {
        auto build = [&](auto &&self, int p, int l, int r) -> void {
            if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = info[l]);
            int m = l + r >> 1;
            self(self, lson, l, m);
            self(self, rson, m + 1, r);
            push_up(p);
        };
        build(build, 1, 1, n);
    }
    auto push_up(int p) -> void {
        f[p] = f[lson] + f[rson];
    }
    auto update(int p, int l, int r, int u, Info x) -> void {
        if (u < l || r < u) return;
        if (l == r) return (void)(f[p] = x);
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        update(lson, l, m, u, x);
        update(rson, m + 1, r, u, x);
        push_up(p);
    }
    auto query(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R) -> Info {
        if (R <  l || r <  L) return Info();
        if (L <= l && r <= R) return f[p];
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        return query(lson, l, m, L, R) + query(rson, m + 1, r, L, R);
    }
    auto find_first(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_first(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_first(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    auto find_last(int p, int l, int r, int L, int R, auto &check) -> int {
        if (R < l || r > L || !check(f[p])) return -1;
        if (l == r) return l;
        int m = l + r >> 1;
        int res = find_last(rson, m + 1, r, L, R, check);
        if (res == -1)
            return find_last(lson, l, m, L, R, check);
        else
            return res;
    }
    #undef lson
    #undef rson
private:
    int n;
    std::vector<Info> f;
};

struct info {
    int lpos, rpos, len;
    info()
    : lpos((int)(1e9)), rpos((int)(1e9)), len(0) {}
    info(int _lpos, int _rpos, int _len)
    : lpos(_lpos), rpos(_rpos), len(_len) {}

    friend info operator + (info l, info r) {
        if (l.rpos > r.lpos)
            return info();
        else
            return info(l.lpos, r.rpos, l.len + r.len);
    }
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m, q;
    std::cin >> n >> m >> q;

    std::vector<int> a(n + 1), b(m + 1), id(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        std::cin >> a[i], id[a[i]] = i;
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
        std::cin >> b[i];

    std::vector<std::set<int>> rng(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        rng[id[b[i]]].insert(i);
    }
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        rng[i].insert(m + 1);

    std::vector<info> Info(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        Info[i].lpos = Info[i].rpos = *rng[i].begin();
        Info[i].len = 1;
    }

    segment_tree<info> seg(Info);

    auto query = [&]() -> void {
        if (seg.query(1, 1, n, 1, n).len != n)
            std::cout << "TIDAK\n";
        else    
            std::cout << "YA\n";
    };

    query();
    for (int i = 1; i <= q; i++) {
        int s, t;
        std::cin >> s >> t;

        rng[id[b[s]]].erase(s);
        int top = *rng[id[b[s]]].begin();
        seg.update(1, 1, n, id[b[s]], info(top, top, 1));

        b[s] = t;
        rng[id[b[s]]].insert(s);
        top = *rng[id[b[s]]].begin();
        seg.update(1, 1, n, id[b[s]], info(top, top, 1));

        query();
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: 思路
docs.text:
考虑 DP，$f(i, j)$ 为

  • 强制选择 $j$ 的最大前缀
  • 强制选择 $j + 1$ 的最大后缀

以上两种情况的最大值

那么每次 DP 当前层的前缀时，由于需要必须有一个不选，那么 $val = max(val, pref + f(i - 1, j - 1))$

每次 DP 当前层的后缀时，同理可以得 $val = max(val, suff + f(i - 1, j))$

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

constexpr Int INF = -1e18;

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m;
    std::cin >> n >> m;

    std::vector a(n + 1, std::vector<Int>(m + 1));
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        for (int j = 1; j <= m; j++)
            std::cin >> a[i][j];

    std::vector f(n + 1, std::vector<Int>(m + 1, INF));
    for (Int i = 1, tmp = 0; i <= m; i++) {
        tmp += a[1][i];
        f[1][i] = std::max(f[1][i], tmp);
        tmp = std::max(tmp, 0LL);
    }
    for (Int i = m, tmp = 0; i >= 1; i--) {
        tmp += a[1][i];
        f[1][i - 1] = std::max(f[1][i - 1], tmp);
        tmp = std::max(tmp, 0LL);
    }

    for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) {
        Int pref1 = a[i][1], pref2 = INF;
        for (int j = 2; j <= m; j++) {
            pref2 = std::max(pref2, pref1 + f[i - 1][j - 1]);
            pref1 = std::max(pref1, 0LL);
            pref1 += a[i][j];
            pref2 += a[i][j];
            f[i][j] = std::max(f[i][j], pref2);
        }
        Int suff1 = a[i][m], suff2 = INF;
        for (int j = m - 1; j >= 1; j--) {
            suff2 = std::max(suff2, suff1 + f[i - 1][j]);
            suff1 = std::max(suff1, 0LL);
            suff1 += a[i][j];
            suff2 += a[i][j];
            f[i][j - 1] = std::max(f[i][j - 1], suff2);
        }
    }

    std::cout << *std::max_element(f[n].begin(), f[n].end()) << '\n';
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Codeforces Round 977 E1 - Digital Village (Easy Version)
Tag: 图论，最小生成树，贪心
思路
docs.text: 先将边排序一遍，跑最小生成树，然后再树上 dfs，求出每个点到另一个点的延迟，再贪心就跑完了 $O(n^3)$

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

struct disjoint_set_union {
public:
    disjoint_set_union(int n)
    : f(n + 1), g(n + 1) {
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) f[i] = i, g[i] = 1;
    }
    auto find(int x) -> int {
        return x == f[x] ? x : f[x] = find(f[x]);
    }
    auto check(int x, int y) -> bool {
        return find(x) == find(y);
    }
    auto merge(int x, int y) -> void {
        if ((x = find(x)) == (y = find(y)))
            return;
        if (g[x] >= g[y])
            g[x] += g[y], f[y] = x;
        else    
            g[y] += g[x], f[x] = y;
    }
private:
    std::vector<int> f, g;
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m, p;
    std::cin >> n >> m >> p;

    std::vector<int> s(p + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= p; i++)
        std::cin >> s[i];

    std::vector<std::array<int, 3>> e(m + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        std::cin >> e[i][0] >> e[i][1] >> e[i][2];
    }
    std::sort(e.begin() + 1, e.end(), [](auto &l, auto &r) {
        return l[2] < r[2];
    });

    disjoint_set_union dsu(n);
    std::vector G(n + 1, std::vector<std::pair<int, int>>());
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        if (dsu.check(e[i][0], e[i][1]))
            continue;
        auto &[u, v, w] = e[i];
        G[u].emplace_back(v, w);
        G[v].emplace_back(u, w);
        dsu.merge(u, v);
    }

    std::vector dis(n + 1, std::vector<int>(n + 1));
    auto dfs = [&](auto &&self, int u, int p, int root) -> void {
        for (auto &[v, w] : G[u]) {
            if (v == p) continue;
            dis[root][v] = std::max(dis[root][u], w);
            self(self, v, u, root);
        }
    };

    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        dfs(dfs, i, 0, i);

    std::set<int> nonchose;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        nonchose.insert(i);

    Int sum = 1e18;
    std::vector<int> d(n + 1, (int)(1e9));
    for (int k = 1; k <= n; k++) {
        int idx = -1;
        for (auto &id : nonchose) {
            std::vector<int> tmp = d;
            Int now = 0;

            for (int i = 1; i <= p; i++) {
                tmp[s[i]] = std::min(tmp[s[i]], dis[s[i]][id]);
                now += tmp[s[i]];
            }

            if (now <= sum) {
                sum = now;
                idx = id;
            }
        }

        nonchose.erase(idx);
        for (int i = 1; i <= p; i++) {
            d[s[i]] = std::min(d[s[i]], dis[s[i]][idx]);
        }

        std::cout << sum << " \n"[k == n];
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Codeforces Round 977 E2 - Digital Village (Hard Version)
Tag: 图论，动态规划，最小生成树
思路
docs.text: 在重构图的过程中进行 DP 即可，考虑两个联通块，分别选择 $i$ 个和 $j$ 个桩，联通的最小代价

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

struct disjoint_set_union {
public:
    disjoint_set_union(int n)
    : f(n + 1), g(n + 1) {
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) f[i] = i, g[i] = 1;
    }
    auto find(int x) -> int {
        return x == f[x] ? x : f[x] = find(f[x]);
    }
    auto check(int x, int y) -> bool {
        return find(x) == find(y);
    }
    auto merge(int x, int y) -> void {
        if ((x = find(x)) == (y = find(y)))
            return;
        if (g[x] >= g[y])
            g[x] += g[y], f[y] = x;
        else    
            g[y] += g[x], f[x] = y;
    }
private:
    std::vector<int> f, g;
};

constexpr Int INF = 1e18;

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m, p;
    std::cin >> n >> m >> p;

    std::vector<int> f(n + 1), a(n + 1, 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= p; i++) {
        int s; std::cin >> s;
        f[s]++;
    }

    std::vector<std::array<int, 3>> e(m + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
        std::cin >> e[i][0] >> e[i][1] >> e[i][2];
    std::sort(e.begin() + 1, e.end(),
        [](auto &l, auto &r) -> bool {
            return l[2] < r[2];
        }
    );

    std::vector h(n + 1, std::vector<Int>());
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
        h[i].resize(f[i] + 1);

    disjoint_set_union dsu(n);
    for (int _ = 1; _ <= m; _++) {
        auto &[u, v, w] = e[_];
        if (dsu.check(u, v)) continue;

        u = dsu.find(u);
        v = dsu.find(v);

        if (f[u]) {
            h[u][0] = 1LL * w * f[u];
        }

        if (f[v]) {
            h[v][0] = 1LL * w * f[v];
        }

        std::vector g(f[u] + f[v] + 1, INF);
        for (int i = 0; i <= f[u]; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j <= f[v]; j++) {
                g[i + j] = std::min(g[i + j], h[u][i] + h[v][j]);
            }
        }

        if (a[u] >= a[v]) {
            h[u].swap(g);
            a[u] += a[v];
            f[u] += f[v];
        } else {
            h[v].swap(g);
            a[v] += a[u];
            f[v] += f[u];
        }

        dsu.merge(u, v);
    }

    h[dsu.find(1)].resize(n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        std::cout << h[dsu.find(1)][i] << " \n"[i == n];
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}

docs.title: Codeforces Round 977 E3 - Digital Village (Extreme Version)
Tag: 图论，贪心，动态规划
思路
docs.text: 考虑连接虚点后当前两个连通块联通的价值变化，和在子树连通块内放置点后的代价，树上 DP 即可

docs.title: 代码
docs.text:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using Int  = int64_t;
using uInt = uint64_t;

struct disjoint_set_union {
public:
    disjoint_set_union(int n)
    : f(n + 1) {
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) f[i] = i;
    }
    auto find(int x) -> int {
        return x == f[x] ? x : f[x] = find(f[x]);
    }
    auto check(int x, int y) -> bool {
        return find(x) == find(y);
    }
    auto merge(int x, int y) -> void {
        if ((x = find(x)) == (y = find(y)))
            return;
        f[y] = x;
    }
private:
    std::vector<int> f;
};

auto code() -> void {
    int n, m, p;
    std::cin >> n >> m >> p;

    std::vector<int> f(2 * n + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= p; i++) {
        int s; std::cin >> s;
        f[s] = 1;
    }

    std::vector<std::array<int, 3>> e(m + 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        auto &[u, v, w] = e[i];
        std::cin >> u >> v >> w;
    }
    std::sort(e.begin() + 1, e.end(),
        [](auto &l, auto &r) -> bool {
            return l[2] < r[2];
        }
    );

    int root = n;
    disjoint_set_union dsu(2 * n);
    std::vector<int> weight(2 * n + 1);
    std::vector<std::vector<int>> G(2 * n + 1);

    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {
        auto &[u, v, w] = e[i];
        if (dsu.check(u, v)) continue;
        weight[++root] = w;
        G[root].push_back(dsu.find(u));
        G[root].push_back(dsu.find(v));
        dsu.merge(root, u);
        dsu.merge(root, v);
    }

    std::vector<Int> cnt;
    auto dfs = [&](auto &&self, int u, int p) -> Int {
        Int val = 0;
        for (auto &v : G[u]) {
            Int son = self(self, v, u);
            cnt.push_back(std::min(son, val));
            val = std::max(val, son);
            f[u] += f[v];
        }
        if (p != 0) {
            val += 1LL * f[u] * (weight[p] - weight[u]);
        }
        return val;
    };

    cnt.push_back(dfs(dfs, root, 0));
    std::sort(cnt.rbegin(), cnt.rend());

    Int ans = 1LL * p * weight[root];
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        ans -= cnt[i - 1];
        std::cout << ans << " \n"[i == n];
    }
}

auto main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]) -> int {
    std::cin.tie(nullptr)->sync_with_stdio(false);

    for (int i = 1, n = (std::cin >> n, n); i <= n; ++i)
        code();

    return 0;
}
